scripts.bundle:nodejs: wasm-bindgen ../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/multi_signature_scheme_to_iota_wasm.wasm --typescript --weak-refs --target nodejs --out-dir node && node ../build/node multi_signature_scheme_to_iota_wasm && tsc --project ./lib/tsconfig.json && node ../build/replace_paths ./lib/tsconfig.json node multi_signature_scheme_to_iota_wasm
scripts.build:nodejs: npm run build:src && npm run bundle:nodejs && wasm-opt -O node/multi_signature_scheme_to_iota_wasm_bg.wasm -o node/multi_signature_scheme_to_iota_wasm_bg.wasm
